entry.title: IDC H9240019D0001 (P00010) awarded to KBR WYLE SERVICES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PRESERVATION OF THE FORCE AND FAMILY

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: PRESIDENTIAL ISSUED EMERGENCY DECLARATION, OR A MAJOR DISASTER DECLARATION

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICAL, OCCUPATIONAL AND SPEECH THERAPISTS, AND AUDIOLOGISTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
